name: BirdDog Technology Limited
description: BirdDog Technology Limited is an Australia-based global video technology company that enhances the quality, speed, and efficiency of live video production. The company specializes in developing and manufacturing high-quality Network Device Interface (NDI) hardware and software solutions, including PTZ cameras, converters, and controllers. Its products enable broadcasters, content creators, and enterprises to transmit high-definition video over standard computer networks with ultra-low latency, simplifying workflows and reducing production costs.
